LanguageData.FullyAutomaticGrowingZone_autoSowDesc: When enabled, this zone will automatically sow crops.
LanguageData.FullyAutomaticGrowingZone_autoHarvestDes: When enabled, this zone will automatically harvest mature crops.
LanguageData.FullyAutomaticGrowingZone_autoStoreDesc: When enabled, harvested crops will be hauled to storage automatically. When disabled, they will drop directly on the field.
LanguageData.FullyAutomaticGrowingZone_flushVirtualBu: Immediately flush all items temporarily stored in virtual storage to storage or onto the field.
